did_this_paper_use_ai_to_obtain_results_.details: The paper is a review article that summarizes existing literature on the role of AI in melanoma diagnosis. It discusses AI methods such as convolutional neural networks (CNNs) and machine learning for tasks like lesion classification and segmentation, but it does not present original research where the authors used AI to obtain new study results. Instead, it reports on findings from other cited studies.

non_compliance_reason: The paper does not use AI to obtain results in dermatology.
